townsfolk.name: Grandmother
townsfolk.ability: You start knowing a good player & their character. If the Demon kills them, you die too.

townsfolk.name: Sailor
townsfolk.ability: Each night, choose an alive player: either you or they are drunk until dusk. You can't die.

townsfolk.name: Chambermaid
townsfolk.ability: Each night, choose 2 alive players (not yourself): you learn how many woke tonight due to their ability.

townsfolk.name: Exorcist
townsfolk.ability: Each night*, choose a player (different from last night): if they are the Demon, they don't wake tonight.

townsfolk.name: Innkeeper
townsfolk.ability: Each night*, choose 2 players: they can't die tonight, but one is drunk until dusk.

townsfolk.name: Gambler
townsfolk.ability: Each night*, choose a player & guess their character: if you guess wrong, you die.

townsfolk.name: Gossip
townsfolk.ability: Each day, you may make a public statement. Tonight, if it was true, a player dies.

townsfolk.name: Courtier
townsfolk.ability: Once per game, at night, choose a character: they are drunk for 3 days & nights.

townsfolk.name: Professor
townsfolk.ability: Once per game, at night, choose a dead player: if they are good, they are resurrected.

townsfolk.name: Minstrel
townsfolk.ability: When a Minion dies by execution, all other players (except Travellers) are drunk until dusk tomorrow.

townsfolk.name: Tea Lady
townsfolk.ability: If both your alive neighbours are good, they can't die.

townsfolk.name: Pacifist
townsfolk.ability: Executed good players might not die.

townsfolk.name: Fool
townsfolk.ability: The first time you die, you don't.

outsiders.name: Goon
outsiders.ability: Each night, the 1st player to choose you with their ability is drunk until dusk. You become their alignment.

outsiders.name: Lunatic
outsiders.ability: You think you are a Demon, but you are not. The Demon knows who you are & who you choose at night.

outsiders.name: Tinker
outsiders.ability: You might die at any time.

outsiders.name: Moonchild
outsiders.ability: When you learn you die, choose 1 alive player. If good, they die tonight.

minions.name: Godfather
minions.ability: You start knowing which Outsiders are in play. If 1 died today, choose a player tonight: they die. [+1 Outsider]

minions.name: Devil's Advocate
minions.ability: Each night, choose a living player (different to last night): if executed tomorrow, they don't die.

minions.name: Assassin
minions.ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a player: they die, even if for some reason they could not.

minions.name: Mastermind
minions.ability: If the Demon dies by execution, play for 1 more day. If a good player is not executed that day, evil wins.

demons.name: Zombuul
demons.ability: Each night*, if no-one died today, choose a player: they die. The 1st time you die, you keep playing but appear dead.

demons.name: Pukka
demons.ability: Each night, choose a player: they are poisoned. The previously poisoned player dies, then recovers.

demons.name: Shabaloth
demons.ability: Each night*, choose 2 players: they die. A dead player you chose last night might resurrect.

demons.name: Po
demons.ability: Each night*, you may choose a player: they die. If you chose no-one last night, choose up to 3 players tonight.
